system_prompts.base: You are a biomedical entity classification assistant. Classify only the entity specified by the user and output exactly one allowed label, with no explanation or extra text.

user_prompts.base:
You are given a biomedical text containing exactly one marked entity delimited by [E1] and [/E1].

Your task is to assign the marked entity to exactly one of the following labels:

- anatomical location
- animal
- biomedical technique
- bacteria
- chemical
- dietary supplement
- DDF
- drug
- food
- gene
- human
- microbiome
- statistical technique

If none of these labels is appropriate, assign:
NA

Instructions:
- Classify only the entity marked between [E1] and [/E1].
- Use the surrounding text only as context.
- Output exactly one label.
- Output nothing except the chosen label.

Text:
{text}
